case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. AINSLEE SHEA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEA, AINSLEE $7,538.25 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $252.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,591.20, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEA, AINSLEE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2020
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200001882) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEA, AINSLEE
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200001882) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
DECLARATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210028097) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100050711), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. SERVED AUG-15-2019, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE AUG-28-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT SHEA, AINSLEE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 210028097) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEA, AINSLEE
